---
title: "FactSet"
page-layout: article
---

# FactSet

**Provider:** FactSet

## Description

Financial data and analytics platform covering global companies, markets, securities, estimates, and economic data. Supports investment research, financial modeling, and market analysis.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Workstation Access, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

Access to FactSet is made possible by Yale School of Management. FactSet Workstation is available for Faculty & PhD Students.

## Links

- [Access resource](http://guides.library.yale.edu/factset)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
